name: Stepper
description: Stateful multi-step wizard with navigation, validation gating, and header indicators.

api.name: Stepper
api.description: Stateful multi-step wizard with navigation, validation gating, and header indicators.

parameters.name: NextLabel
parameters.description: Override the "Next" button label. When null, uses the localized L["Stepper.Next"]. (#245)

parameters.name: BackLabel
parameters.description: Override the "Back" button label. When null, uses the localized L["Stepper.Back"]. (#245)

parameters.name: FinishLabel
parameters.description: Override the "Finish" button label. When null, uses the localized L["Stepper.Finish"]. (#245)

records.name: StepperContext
records.signature:
StepperContext(
        int ActiveStep,
        EventCallback<int> SetActiveStep,
        Lumeo.Orientation Orientation,
        bool Linear,
        int StepCount,
        Stepper Parent,
        // The role=tablist element id — the anchor for the DOM-order roving-nav probe
        // so arrow/Home/End tab order tracks the live DOM after a keyed reorder.
        string ContainerId)

examples.title: Basic Stepper
examples.code:
<Stepper @bind-ActiveStep="_step" OnFinish="HandleFinish">
    <StepperStep Title="Account Info" Description="Set up your account">
        <Input Placeholder="Email address" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Profile" Description="Personalize your profile">
        <Input Placeholder="Display name" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Review">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Review your information.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
</Stepper>

@code {
    private int _step;
    private void HandleFinish() { /* complete */ }
}

examples.title: With Optional Step
examples.code:
<Stepper @bind-ActiveStep="_step">
    <StepperStep Title="Basics">
        <Input Placeholder="Your name" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Extras" Optional="true">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">This step is optional.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Finish">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">All done.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
</Stepper>

examples.title: Validation Gating (IsValid)
examples.code:
<Stepper @bind-ActiveStep="_step">
    <StepperStep Title="Email" Description="Required to continue"
                 IsValid="@(() => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_email))">
        <Input @bind-Value="_email" Placeholder="Email address" />
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Done">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Step gating passed.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
</Stepper>

@code {
    private int _step;
    private string? _email;
}

examples.title: Clickable Step Headers (AllowStepClick)
examples.code:
<Stepper @bind-ActiveStep="_step" Linear="false" AllowStepClick="true">
    <StepperStep Title="One" Description="Jump freely">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Click any step header to navigate directly.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Two" Description="Non-linear">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Reachable in any order.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
    <StepperStep Title="Three">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">The last step.</Lumeo.Text>
    </StepperStep>
</Stepper>

records.name: StepRegistration
records.signature:
StepRegistration(
        Guid Id,
        string Title,
        string? Description,
        bool Optional,
        bool Completed,
        Func<bool>? IsValid,
        RenderFragment? IconContent,
        RenderFragment? ChildContent,
        bool KeepMounted)

mdSummary:
# Stepper

Stateful multi-step wizard with navigation, validation gating, and header indicators.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/stepper

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Stepper | ScopedDirection | `LayoutDirection?` | `` |  |
| Stepper | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Stepper | ActiveStep | `int` | `` |  |
| Stepper | ActiveStepChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` |  |
| Stepper | Orientation | `Lumeo.Orientation` | `Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal` |  |
| Stepper | Linear | `bool` | `true` |  |
| Stepper | AllowStepClick | `bool` | `` |  |
| Stepper | OnFinish | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| Stepper | NextLabel | `string?` | `` | Override the "Next" button label. When null, uses the localized L["Stepper.Next"]. (#245) |
| Stepper | BackLabel | `string?` | `` | Override the "Back" button label. When null, uses the localized L["Stepper.Back"]. (#245) |
| Stepper | FinishLabel | `string?` | `` | Override the "Finish" button label. When null, uses the localized L["Stepper.Finish"]. (#245) |
| Stepper | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Stepper | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Context | `Stepper.StepperContext?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Title | `string` | `""` |  |
| StepperStep | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Optional | `bool` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Completed | `bool` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | IsValid | `Func<bool>?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | KeepMounted | `bool` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| StepperStep | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Stepper) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (StepperStep) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (StepperStep) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ActiveStepChanged` (`EventCallback<int>`)
- `OnFinish` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- `StepperStep`

## Cascading values it expects
- `ScopedDirection` (`LayoutDirection?`)
- `Context` (`Stepper.StepperContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ThemeService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `IComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `ArrowUp` — HandleStepKeyDown handles ArrowUp in Stepper.razor
- `ArrowDown` — HandleStepKeyDown handles ArrowDown in Stepper.razor

## Example
```razor
<Stepper />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Stepper/Stepper.razor`
- `UI/Stepper/StepperStep.razor`
